raw_affiliation_strings: Stefano Pagiola, Paola Agostini, Cees de Haan, Juan Pablo Ruíz World Bank, 1818 H Str NW, Washington DC, 20433, USA. spagiola@worldbank.org; pagostini@worldbank.org; cdehaan@worldbank.org; jruiz@worldbank.orgStefano Pagiola is a senior environmental economist in the World Bank's Environment Department. He leads the Bank's work on PES.Paola Agostini is a senior environmental economist in the World Bank's Africa Region. She led the team that prepared the Silvopastoral Project and is now working on replicating the approach in Africa.Cees de Haan is a consultant for the World Bank. Prior to retiring from the World Bank, he led the technical work on the project.Juan Pablo Ruíz is a natural resource management specialist in the World Bank's Latin America and Caribbean Region. He leads the World Bank task team working on the Silvopastoral Project
